title: Kaggle Competitive Landscape 2024-2026
summary: Ensembled fine-tuned open-source foundation models — not bespoke architectures — now dominate nearly every Kaggle leaderboard. The differentiator is no longer "which model" but whose synthetic data, whose test-time tricks, and whose cross-validation discipline. Three patterns are unusually load-bearing: (1) teacher→student distillation, (2) post-processing worth 0.01-0.03 LB, and (3) farid.one/kaggle-solutions as the single highest-ROI research resource.
